text:
I Can Read!
SHARED
My
First
READING
Biscuit
nds a Friend
by ALYSSA SATIN CAPUCILLI
pictures by PAT SCHORIES

ST
Woof! Woof!
What has Biscuit found?
5

Is it a ball?
Woof!
Is it a bone?
Woof!
6
7

Quack!
It is a little duck.
The little duck is lost.
Woof! Woof!
8
9

We will bring
the little duck
back to the pond.
10
*
Woof! Woof!
11

Here are your mother
your father.
Quack!
Here, little duck.
and
Here is the pond.
12
13

Here are your brothers
and your sisters.
Quack! Quack!
The ducks say thank you.
Thank you for finding
the little duck.
14
15

Quack!
The little duck
wants to play.
16
Quack!
Woof!
17
Quack!
Woof!
3

Splash!
Biscuit fell into the pond!
Silly Biscuit.
You are all wet!
18
19

Woof!
Oh no, Biscuit.
Not a big shake!
Woof!
Time to go home, Biscuit.
20
21

Quack! Quack!
Say good-bye, Biscuit.
Woof! Woof!
Good-bye, little duck.
22
23

Biscuit has found
a new friend.
24
